• HTML5 web game "Mega Miner NG" with canvas-based mining gameplay
  • Multiplayer functionality using MQTT broker for real-time player synchronization
  • Procedural map generation with various ore types and mining mechanics
  • Progressive web app features including offline storage and cloud sync
  • Responsive design with mobile touch controls and desktop keyboard support
    class GameEngine { constructor() { /* ... */ } update() { /* ... */ } draw() { /* ... */ } }
    class NetworkManager { constructor() { /* ... */ } connect() { /* ... */ } handleMessage() { /* ... */ } }
    class ShopSystem { constructor() { /* ... */ } buyUpgrade() { /* ... */ } updateUI() { /* ... */ } }

This is a complex HTML5 mining game with multiplayer capabilities built using canvas rendering, MQTT networking, and IndexedDB for persistence. The game features procedural map generation, various ore types to mine, upgrade systems, and supports both desktop and mobile play with touch controls.
